subject: [mszeredi-fuse:for-next 9/12] fs/fuse/dev.c:1818:43: warning: variable 'folio_offset' is uninitialized when used here

reviews.author: Miklos Szeredi
reviews.summary: reviewer pointed out that variable 'folio_offset' is uninitialized when used, but noted that it was already fixed and had been successfully pushed
reviews.raw_body:
Already fixed up, but the push failed (I was travelling) and forgot to
retry.   Sorry for the trouble.

Now pushed.

Thanks,
Miklos

2026-03-04.patch_summary: This patch resolves a merge conflict in the fuse kernel module by swapping two lines of code that were incorrectly ordered, fixing an uninitialized variable warning.
